  1. io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware

io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware

Packages that use io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware
Package
Description
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain
Core domain model for operating system introspection.
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.computer
 
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware
Hardware value objects and the OSHardwareObject sealed interface.
  • Classes in io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware used by io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain
    Class
    Description
    ComputerSystemInfo
    Value object representing the overall computer system.
    DiskInfo
    Value object representing a physical disk/storage device.
    DisplayInfo
    Value object representing a display/monitor.
    GraphicsCardInfo
    Value object representing a graphics card.
    MemoryInfo
    Value object representing system memory information.
    NetworkInterfaceInfo
    Value object representing a network interface.
    OperatingSystemInfo
    Value object representing operating system information.
    PowerSourceInfo
    Value object representing a power source/battery.
    ProcessorInfo
    Value object representing CPU/Processor information.
    SoundCardInfo
    Value object representing a sound card.
    UsbDeviceInfo
    Value object representing a USB device.

    Class
    Description
    ComputerSystemInfo
    Value object representing the overall computer system.
    OperatingSystemInfo
    Value object representing operating system information.
  • Classes in io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware used by io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware
    Class
    Description
    ComputerSystemInfo.BaseboardInfo
    Value object for the baseboard/motherboard.
    ComputerSystemInfo.FirmwareInfo
    Value object for system firmware/BIOS.
    DeviceStatus
     
    DeviceType
     
    DiskInfo.PartitionInfo
    Value object for disk partitions.
    MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule
    Value object for individual physical memory sticks/modules.
    OperatingSystemInfo
    Value object representing operating system information.
    OSHardwareObject
    Sealed interface for all hardware-related operating system value objects.
    ProcessorInfo.CacheInfo
    Value object for processor cache information.
    ProcessorInfo.CoreTopology
    Value object for individual core topology.
    UsbDeviceInfo
    Value object representing a USB device.
